nasb.text: So they gathered them up, and filled twelve baskets with fragments from the five barley loaves which were left over by those who had eaten.

esv.text: So they gathered them up and filled twelve baskets with fragments from the five barley loaves left by those who had eaten.

cnv.text: 門徒就把眾人吃剩那五個大麥餅的零碎收拾起來，裝滿了十二個籃子。

ccb.text: 他们便把大家吃剩的那五个大麦饼的零碎收拾起来，装满了十二个篮子。

csbs.text: 他们就把大家吃剩的那五个大麦饼的碎块收拾起来，装满了十二个篮子。
